reviews.review_msg: Listen to a lecture and u will pass, even no need in readings, but readings speed up passing exams and understanding lectures and concepts. Lectures are clear, humorous and simple. Useful tips, told us how to look for sources for an essay. A great understanding prof. Wish I could take this class in first semester as a freshman.
Best prof I've had at uni. Im I third year and no one is more fluent and easy as him. Just show up to class understand his teachings and give your own examples in exams.
A TRUE GEM... I WISH EVERY PROF WAS JAMIE RENNIE!!!! YOU SIR AN ICON!! HAVE A GREAT SUMMER WITH YOUR BEAUTIFUL FAMILY AND NEW BORN BABY

He is one of the best professor that I have ever taken by far. He is very passionate when it comes to teaching. His tests are easy and you will easy get an A+. In class, he delivers lot of examples along with lecture content. He made me wanna study communication more . He is funny and generous to guide you if you wanna get good marks .
Nice professor

Jamie is a very knowledgeable professor when it comes to communications and media studies. He pulls examples from every decade, and shows the relationship between those respective decades. When it comes to instructions however, he is very vague, and does not like reiterating certain steps. Does not check emails so do not bother, even for essays
very nice
Great guy! All you have to do is attend lecture, and you will get great mark.
the best prof I've ever seen!!!

Great lecturer, I found it was incredibly helpful to actually go to his class and take notes, he condenses the material down well and gives you what matters, despite this course covering a lot of ground. Also a fun game: count how many times he says trilingual puns during the semester, take a shot for each one. Youll be on the floor drunk��

His classes are an easy A but be prepared to be bombarded by subtle far left borderline communist propaganda. Not a joke he doesn't seem to have an original idea in his head just repeating what he has gotten from his time in the broken Uni system.
Amazing pro, I really really want to take more class with him!! All of 200level class key points more or less had mentioned in his class. Make lecture easy to follow.
Best Professor i have ever seen

I had this professor for a communications class. He was very knowledgeable and helpful. He provided lots of opportunities to ask him for help or feedback. His lectures are usually very interesting, hes quite funny, and his tests are relatively easy.  I would definitely recommend him as a professor.
WONDERFUL PROFESSOR
Likes the sound of his own voice, this little fella.  And if, faute de mieux, you hafta study with him, bring a book to read while he lectures.
he is really helpful that I learn a lot from his lecture he is the motivation why I study cmns funny guy, I like him if you have any question, just go and ask him
He's really awesome !!!! Learning a lot from his lecture !!!
JAMIE IS AWESOME! HE IS THE BEST! LOVE HIM!
He is amazing. Fun lecture, easy explanation (using Justin Bieber a lot), fair exams.  If you put enough effort your grade will be fair enough.
He is a great teach if you do want to learn sth. useful and interesting.

This professor is just amazing. He explains the course material in great detail with lots of great examples all the while keeping it humorous. CMNS110 can be boring course but he makes it so much fun that you want to go to the lecture. So few teachers have this skill and he excels at it. If you skip class though, you will probably fail.
He's the most relaxed professor . I thought he was a fair marker and I really enjoyed learning from him. Readings were interesting. I highly recommend Jamie
He's a very funny guy though it's hard to get high grade in his class but definitely not a low one if you participate every class, pay attention  to his lectures and take some notes.
Jamie is the best prof! Don't hesitate, just take his classes. His lectures are funny and have a lot of various information. Make notes during class, it will help you on tests.

He is such an enthusiastic prof. It is important to go to his lectures, because for that class specifically his mid term and exam is based off of the lecture material. Yet going to lecture is not a drag. He spoke well and delivered the concepts in an organized understandable fashion. He also repeats a lot of the main ideas. Would take again.
He is and awesome prof. and really enthusiastic. his knowledge of the subject is amazing and i loved the lectures.

Exams and papers were all lecture based.  He says at the beginning of semester that they will be and readings are mostly just for participation marks in tutorial.  Good speaker and clear lectures but sometimes drags on.  If you want CMNS history take 210, but any new media interest you should probably stick to 253W
THE BEST AND MOST INTERESTING PROF ALIVE UPTODATE... im not even kidding

Jamie is such a humorous guy. He has a very clear teaching style. Once you follow his requirement and put some effort, you will learn a whole bunch of knowledge from his class, even though you may not get very high grade finally.
Interesting lecture and clear speech! He is really a nice guy! Haven't taken 210 yet, but expect to.
really passionate, Jamie is one of the best prof i've ever met in sfu. cant wait to attend his class every week since his class is extremely interesting.
Nice prof. Clear in class content and you will sure receive grade mark if you attend lecture.  Also provide helpful extra help outside classes. Greatest prof ever.

Loved this class, it was the most interesting one this semester and I was expecting another 110 disaster. Jaime is funny, nice, cool, and understanding. He is willing to give extensions to trusted students and met me at a coffee shop to talk about my essay. I would take any course with him and his AWESOME TA nick again.
